description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

We are recruiting groups to help make "Minna-katsu Summer 2026" a success.

Event date and time: August 2, 2026 (Sunday), 10:30 a.m. to 4:00 p.m.

Location: Civic Activity Center (7th floor, Maruhiro Department Store Hanno)

What we're looking for: Groups that can run workshops open to all ages

Application period: May 7 to 22, 2026 (Thursday to Friday)

How to apply: Visit the Civic Activity Center in person and fill out a participation application form.

Number of spots: 5 groups. If we receive more applications than spots, we will select participants by lottery.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jitishinkoka/shiminkatudou/11245.html
summary: ℹ️ Recruiting groups to participate in Minna-katsu Summer 2026
